title: Turnstile
excerpt: description: Validate Cloudflare Turnstile tokens in Pages Functions using the Turnstile Plugin. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. [Turnstile](https://developers.cloudflare.com/turnstile/) is Cloudflare's smart CAPTCHA alternative. The Turnstile Pages Plugin validates Cloudflare Turnstile tokens.
